testcase.name: test_payment_gateway
testcase.failure: AssertionError: Payment gateway returned unexpected status. Expected: 200 Actual: 422 Request: POST /api/v1/payments/process

testcase.name: test_order_processing
testcase.failure: NullPointerException: order object was None after create_order() returned success. Possible race condition in order_service.create() under concurrent load.

testcase.name: test_cart_concurrent_updates
testcase.error: ConnectionError: database connection pool exhausted Max pool size: 10, Active: 10, Waiting: 23

skipped.message: Legacy payment flow deprecated, skipping until migration complete
